title: Configured Keep Inventory
description: Keep some items on death! Slots kept are configurable.
body:
A simple mod that makes items in certain slots not drop on death. By default the mod keeps:
- The first 4 hotbar items
- Armor
- Offhand item

## Configuration
The mod's config file can be found at **_your_mod_profile/config/configuredkeepinventory.json_**

The config allows you to configure what slots are kept on death. The config contains a list of integers representing the index of each slot.

### Slot indexes:
- 0 - 8 = Hotbar
- 9 - 35 = Main Inventory
- 36 = Boots
- 37 = Leggings
- 38 = Chestplate
- 39 = Helmet
- 40 = Offhand
